name: relatorios-diarios-2026
description: App web e APK do projeto Relatorios Diarios 2026.

scripts.android:add: npm run build:web && npx cap add android
scripts.cap:copy: npm run build:web && npx cap copy android
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build:web && npx cap sync android
scripts.release:debug: npm run release:prepare && npm run apk:debug && npm run release:publish -- --apk android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk && npm run build:web
